faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Eltingville?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Eltingville range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of ant species. faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Eltingville, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Eltingville properties commonly deal with pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures, while pavement ants typically invade through cracks in foundations. Our technicians can identify the specific species and apply the most effective treatment method.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in Eltingville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Eltingville locations. Ant infestations can grow rapidly, so we prioritize quick response times to prevent the problem from worsening. Once treated, most customers see significant reduction in ant activity within 24-48 hours, with complete elimination typically achieved within one to two weeks.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for ant control services in Eltingville?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a comprehensive service guarantee. If ants return between scheduled treatments, we'll come back at no additional charge. We also provide follow-up inspections and preventative advice to keep your Eltingville property ant-free year-round, including sealing entry points and addressing moisture issues that attract ants.
